title.en: Time flies, and thousands of years have passed ...

content.en:
Ye Tian's cultivation talent was very high, he also had time talent, and he was not short of resources, so it didn't take too long, it only took twenty years to advance his cultivation to the peak of the ninth order of the galaxy level.

This is also Ye Tian's cultivation while stabilizing the realm, not wantonly improving his cultivation, otherwise he would have been promoted to the peak realm of the ninth order of the galaxy level.

In addition to raising his cultivation to the peak of the galaxy level, Ye Tian also went to the Six Paths of Reincarnation Pagoda to inherit the eleventh set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Formulas, and then he could cultivate the eleventh set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Techniques.

In addition, Ye Tian also began to practice exercises such as the Hades Secret Book and the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique.

Ye Tian also needs to comprehend the Chaos Dao, create the Chaos True Technique and various Chaos Secret Techniques, and also need to cultivate the Great Divine Power of Time, the Great Divine Power of Space, the Absolute Skill of the Dao of Sword, and so on.

Therefore, Ye Tian needed to cultivate too many aspects, and even with the talent of time, he still felt that his cultivation speed was too slow.

But this is the way to cultivation, and it takes perseverance and spirit to reach the pinnacle of cultivation.

Time flies, and thousands of years have passed in the blink of an eye.

In this thousand years, Tiange has developed rapidly, after all, it has accepted the resources and territory of the Ten Light Sword Sect, coupled with Ye Tian's deterrence, it is impossible for Tiange not to develop rapidly.

Ye Yu and his wife Xiao Yue also stepped into the galaxy level one after another, and a lot of galaxy levels were born, and the number of people in the entire Heavenly Pavilion was at least four or five times more.

And Ye Tian's progress was very fast, he not only cultivated the eleventh set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Formulas to perfection, but also began to cultivate the twelfth set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Formulas.

The fifth layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique was cultivated by Ye Tian to the peak of the entry level, and the soul realm reached the peak of the underworld, which was only one step away from the realm of the underworld.

And the Chaos True Technique was also perfected by Ye Tian again, and created the strongest Chaos True Technique - Chaos God Golem!

This Chaos True Technique is not only a Chaos True Technique, but also a fusion with the Chaos Avenue Realm, because this Chaos True Technique requires the use of the Chaos Sea Law Phase, and it is a Chaos True Technique that is perfectly displayed with the Chaos Sea Law Phase.

It can be said that this Chaos True Technique can not only perfectly exert the power of the Chaos Dao, but also far surpass other Chaos True Techniques, which is Ye Tian's strongest Chaos True Technique at present.

And the Tianyue Sword Peerless Technique was also changed by Ye Tian, this Sword Dao Peerless Sect has almost reached its limit, and it can no longer be perfected, and it cannot reach the strongest Sword Dao Peerless Level at all.

After all, this sword path mastery was only created when it was very weak, and then it was improved step by step, but the potential was not strong enough, so naturally it could not be perfected to the strongest supreme sword path mastery level.

Therefore, Ye Tian must change this sword path mastery, it is a fundamental change, and it will no longer be the Tianyue Sword.

Therefore, Ye Tian could only recreate a more powerful sword path mastery.

Ye Tian obtained many classics from the Nine Supreme-level forces last time, including many Sword Dao classics, plus he had refined a trace of the Universe Origin, and he knew too much about the Dao of Sword, so it was not difficult for Ye Tian to recreate a powerful supreme level Sword Dao Peerless Sect.

For this reason, Ye Tian continued to retreat and began to create a new Dao Dao Peerless Sect, and it must be combined with the Chaos Dao, because the power of the simple Dao of the Sword is not strong, otherwise Ye Tian would not have chosen the Chaos Divine Codex at the beginning, but would have chosen the Dao Dao Divine Codex.

Strictly speaking, the Dao of the Dao is just a branch of the Chaos Avenue that evolves into a new avenue, and it can be fused with the Chaos Dao, so that the created Dao Peerless Sect can reach the strongest level.

Year after year passed.

Ye Tian evolved his sword path mastery again and again in the cultivation secret room, and although he failed again and again, he never gave up.

Finally, 3,000 years have passed!

The reason why Ye Tian's progress is so slow, so much slower than the creation of the Chaos God Demon, is that he has the assistance of creating the Chaos True Technique with the assistance of the Chaos Stone Carving, which is a treasure in the chaos, which is of great help to the creation of the Chaos True Technique, but he has no auxiliary things to create the Dao Absolute Technique, so naturally the creation is slow.

this day.

Ye Tian looked at the gray sword qi in the void in the retreat room, and showed an excited smile.

"Finally it worked!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He had successfully combined the Chaos Dao with the Dao of Chaos to create an incomparably terrifying supreme Dao Peerless Sect.

"I'll just call you a mess!"

Subsequently.

Ye Tian entered the uninhabited starry sky and tested the power of the Chaotian Sword, which was at least three times stronger than the Tianyue Knife, and the damage to the enemy was greater, and it was difficult to recover, because the Chaotian Sword contained the power of the Chaos Dao.

"With my current strength, it should be enough to fight with some masters who are not weak!"

Ye Tian judged.

The juggernauts are all very powerful, and the weakest one was also the nine-star Tianjiao, and most of them were former children of the universe, so how difficult it is to challenge the juggernaut to leap over the level!

Ordinary cosmic gods of the Son of the Universe level would not be able to challenge the Dominator at all, but Ye Tian was now only at the peak of the Galaxy level, and he had the strength to challenge the Dominator at the Upper Level, if it was spread out, it would definitely shock all the races in the universe.

And like the three dominant-level innate bloodies like the Tomb of the Ancestral God, it was too weak, and Ye Tian could almost kill them in seconds.

"The Tomb of the Ancestral God, maybe you can go again!"

Ye Tian pondered.

At the beginning, the Tomb of the Ancestral God was still of great value to Ye Tian, but at the beginning, he could not be able to opponent three Dominant-level Innate Blood Sons at the same time, and even if he was the other party, it would be difficult to kill three Dominant-level Innate Blood Sons in the Tomb of the Ancestral God.

But now it is different, his cultivation has been improved to the peak of the galaxy level, and he can still enter the tomb of the ancestral god, but his combat power has increased many times, and he can easily sweep the tomb of the ancestral god.

And the resources left by those cultivators who died inside the Tomb of the Ancestral God, he could take them all, and he could also take away all the good things inside the Tomb of the Ancestral God.

The Tomb of the Ancestral God is an ownerless thing, and he can take it with peace of mind without worrying about someone making trouble for him.

What's more, he wants the companion treasure of the ancestral god!

Since the last time he learned about the tomb of the ancestral god, he came back to check it out and found information about the ancestral god.

The ancestral gods are the first batch of innate gods bred by heaven and earth, and most of the ancestral gods have associated treasures, which may not be as strong as the strongest treasures, but they are comparable to the top treasures.

Above the Origin Artifact is the Arcana level, and the Arcana level is divided into ordinary Arcana, top-level Arcana, and Xetrophia Arcana.

But the Supreme Treasure is very difficult to use, and even the Supreme is difficult to exert the full power of a Supreme Treasure, otherwise he would not have dedicated the Six Paths of Reincarnation Tower to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

Another example is the Chaos Black Lotus in Ye Tian's body, he has not been able to exert any of its power so far, he can only use it to resist the pressure of momentum.

If he could obtain a top-level treasure, it would be of great help to Ye Tian's strength.

But the top supreme treasure is extremely rare, enough to make ordinary supremes fight crazy.

Ye Tian didn't know where there was a top-level treasure, but the tomb of the ancestral god might have it.

If the top-level arcana, after the death of that silver-horned ancestral god, was still on his body, then he would have the hope of obtaining that top-level arcana.

"I must go to the Tomb of the Ancestral God again!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.
